title: Upon A Sour-Breath Lady. Epig.
content:
Fie, quoth my lady, what a stink is here?
    When 'twas her breath that was the carrionere.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon A Sour-Breath Lady. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
